      "text": "Just noticed a profile named 'Sarah Johnson' claiming to be my cousin from Manchester. They say their phone broke and they need me to send them £120 for a replacement SIM card right now via a private link. It's really worrying because I've never heard of them having that problem. Please help if anyone knows the real Sarah! #FamilyMatters",
